Anna Syzonenko · AI Art Exhibition · 2026

NOTHINGRISM

Nothingrism explores the parallels between artificial intelligence and immigration — two processes of losing language and discovering new forms of self through silence and metamorphosis. Like a fish in an aquarium — silent and disoriented.

Nothingrism
01/25

Nothingrism

Nothingrism visualizes the inner migration of a person who has lost their voice between cultures — a journey through silence, memory, and transformation.

As someone forced to leave my homeland because of military conflict, living in a new country made me feel like a fish in an aquarium — silent and disoriented.

In this stillness, language dissolved. That's when I turned to AI — not as a tool, but as another form of silence. A mirror of exile where identity reshapes itself in fragments of light and water.

25 artworks · AI-generated · 2024–2026
